<!-- politty:command::start -->
# init

Initialize a new project

**Usage**

```
init [options] <name>
```

**Arguments**

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `name` | Project name | Yes |

**Options**

| Option | Alias | Description | Required | Default |
|--------|-------|-------------|----------|---------|
| `--template <TEMPLATE>` | `-t` | Project template to use | No | `"default"` |
<!-- politty:command::end -->
